title: Introducing GPT-5.4: Native Computer Use, 1M Context Window, and Tool Search

structured_analysis.background: OpenAI Blog 于 2026-04-08 发布相关动态。
structured_analysis.key_action: OpenAI released GPT-5.4, the first general-purpose model with native, state-of-the-art computer-use
structured_analysis.technical_implication: The model can interact with desktops through screenshots, control the mouse and keyboard, and write code using Playwright for browser automation

trend_insight: 监管讨论正从原则倡议转向更具体的制度和责任边界。
risk_or_opportunity: 需关注合规约束、能力退役或生态迁移带来的执行风险。
